title: pinellia cordata
intro: Pinellia cordata, also known as water dragon or cordate pinellia, is a type of plant in the family Arum, native to China and Japan. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Pinellia cordata include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as alleviation of digestive problems and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Pinellia cordata is often combined with other herbs to create teas, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
